title: Marble Sort!
notes:
New Levels: Prepare yourself for 80 NEW LEVELS! Experience fun and exciting new challenges!

- New Mechanic: Unbox new Bubble Marbles! - Use slow float physics to beat levels.
- New Mechanic: Crack the new Double Box! Break through a box inside a box to keep moving.

Bug Fixes and optimizations

Play Marble Sort now!

title: Zooba: Zoo Battle Royale Games
notes:
Improved match performance and reduced network usage for a smoother gameplay experience.
Fixed a bug where Tai Lung's passive ability could trigger more times than intended during a match.
Fixed an issue where players on some foldable devices could get stuck in the spectator view and were unable to leave a match.
General bug fixes and stability improvements.

title: Match Masters
notes:
Leap into our latest update!
Meet Froggy Fu, our new zen Legendary booster. A lotus tile kicker that turns matches into big scores.
Space Chase returns, simplified and designed for smoother play!
Power-ups will return soon as a time-limited event, where your regular boosters will act as power-ups at no extra cost.
Update now and jump into the action!
